description: Individual questions or tasks within a module artifact. One artifact can have multiple questions each with their own title, description, instructions and submission requirement.

fields.name: order
fields.description: Display order of this question within the artifact. Starts at 1.

fields.name: description
fields.description: What the learner needs to complete for this question
fields.example: Map the incident timeline, affected services, and likely failure points.

fields.name: instructions
fields.description: Detailed task steps for this question
fields.example: 1) Review incident brief. 2) Mark signal sources. 3) Build failure map.

fields.name: submission_required
fields.description: Whether this specific question requires a submission from the learner.

fields.name: is_active
fields.description: Whether this question is active and visible to learners.

constraints.name: chk_order_positive
constraints.description: Order must start at 1 or above.

indexes.name: idx_aq_artifact_id
indexes.description: Fetch all questions for an artifact

indexes.name: idx_aq_artifact_order
indexes.description: Enforce unique order per artifact and drive display sequence

indexes.name: idx_aq_active
indexes.description: Fetch only active questions for an artifact

relationships.description: Each question belongs to one artifact

sample_records.title: Failure Investigation Map
sample_records.description: Create a first-pass incident map showing service boundaries and symptom points.
sample_records.instructions: 1) Read incident context. 2) Draw request flow. 3) Mark weak signals.

sample_records.title: Hypothesis List
sample_records.description: List at least 3 root-cause hypotheses based on your investigation map.
sample_records.instructions: 1) Review your map. 2) List hypotheses. 3) Rank by likelihood.

sample_records.title: Evidence Mapping
sample_records.description: Map log and trace evidence to each root-cause hypothesis.
sample_records.instructions: 1) Pull relevant logs. 2) Attach trace IDs. 3) Map to hypotheses.

sample_records.title: Final Investigation Report
sample_records.description: Submit a structured report with evidence-backed root-cause and next debugging actions.
sample_records.instructions: 1) Refine your map. 2) Prioritize hypotheses. 3) Submit final report.
